title: Process Engineer Vacancy at UltraTech Cement - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at UltraTech Cement - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at UltraTech Cement are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About UltraTech Cement:
UltraTech Cement is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UltraTech Cement!
